chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 33 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 08.11.2023 Mr. Muhammad Tarique Maitlo, Advocate for applicants. Complainant is present in person. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for applicants does not press this application by filing such statement, and submits that instant case has been transferred from Anti-Terrorism Court to Ordinary Court, and he intends to file a fresh application for bail before the said Court, and seeks directions to the trial Court to decide the bail application on its own merits independent of the order already passed by the Anti-Terrorism Court, to which learned Additional Prosecutor General has no objection. Accordingly, this application is dismissed as not pressed in above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
